note:
It's just too much text, man. These are fucking essays, and the goddamn table is disgusting. It just doesn't make any sense. This is so ugly, and they're so weak.

Look, the theme is fine. Hey, saying X many people completed this task, but it's like you are not even at all keeping in mind how normal emails look. It's like you're reinventing all of this shit completely from scratch. It just looks like amateur hour and misplaced and just completely wrong.
